original_image_tags: A typewritten table listing rocket and missile launch sequences from 1977 to early 1978, with three black punch holes at the bottom edge.

elements.description: A typed document table listing launch sequences (1368 to 1387) with columns for Date, Nickname, OP #, Facility, Vehicle Type, Program, Cum By Booster, Command, and Cum By Command. Page number 'PAGE 70' is visible at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the visual content is a typed table listing rocket and missile launch sequences, and neither side quotes any specific text inside an image that contradicts the other.
